mapper.select: SELECT c.id AS commentId, c.content AS content, c.create_time AS createTime, c.like_count AS likeCount, u.username AS username, u.user_avatar AS userAvatar FROM tb_comment c LEFT JOIN tb_user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.song_id = #{songId} AND c.type = 0 ORDER BY c.like_count DESC, c.create_time ASC

SELECT c.id AS commentId, c.content AS content, c.create_time AS createTime, c.like_count AS likeCount, u.username AS username, u.user_avatar AS userAvatar FROM tb_comment c LEFT JOIN tb_user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.playlist_id = #{playlistId} AND c.type = 1 ORDER BY c.like_count DESC, c.create_time ASC
